title: Return "deadline mode" configuration through API
excerpt:
When querying a board with the monday.com API I would like to get information about the deadline mode: 

Is it active
What columns were selected 
This information could be in the settings of the date/timeline, status and…

posts.author: johannesgeyer (Johannes Geyer)
posts.cookedHtml:
When querying a board with the monday.com API I would like to get information about the deadline mode:

  • Is it active
  • What columns were selected
    This information could be in the settings of the date/timeline, status and people column or a field in the board itself.
